ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "education_system" TEXT /* Description of the country's education system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with these metrics */,
  "x5th_percentile" REAL /* 5th percentile score */,
  "x25th_percentile" REAL /* 25th percentile score */,
  "x50th_percentile" REAL /* 50th percentile score (median) */,
  "x75th_percentile" REAL /* 75th percentile score */,
  "x95th_percentile" REAL /* 95th percentile score */,
  "mean_girls" REAL /* Mean score for girls */,
  "mean_boys" REAL /* Mean score for boys */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment year */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data quality metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES assessment_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_data_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_quality_id") REFERENCES data_quality ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year of assessment */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the assessment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assessment period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assessment period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_performance" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender performance entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metrics associated with this gender entry */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the students (e.g., boys, girls) */,
  "mean_score" REAL /* Mean score for the specified gender */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment year */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_performance_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES assessment_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_performance_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of assessment */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_types" (
  "assessment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment associated with this result */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metrics */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment year */,
  "score" REAL /* The score obtained in the assessment */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data quality metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES assessment_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_results_data_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_quality_id") REFERENCES data_quality ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., educator, researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institute" TEXT /* Affiliated institute or organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., login, data access) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user at the time of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., survey, administrative data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score indicating data reliability */,
  "issues" TEXT /* Description of any data quality issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarking_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmarking report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metrics */,
  "comparison_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country being compared */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarking_reports_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarking_reports_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES assessment_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarking_reports_comparison_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarking_reports_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)
